heading: Step 3: (Optional) Configure Private Network Access
body:
Configure peering connections or private endpoints for your
applications to connect to your databases for additional
security controls.

To configure peering connections, see [VPC/VNet peering](vpc-peering).
To configure private endpoints, see [private endpoint connections](private-endpoint).

![MongoDB Atlas Secure your Database image](/images/atlas-plp/atlas-plp-secure-db.svg)

Connect to your Database
